name: basic_two_repos
description: Two matching repos removed, then non-transactional product remove. Python preserves Repositories insertion order for the rr aliases; Rust emits them sorted (Repositories is a BTreeMap + the stable-sort delta). zypper rr is order-irrelevant.

name: dry_basic
description: Dry-run: rr and product-remove previewed, nothing executed.

name: sentinel_skip
description: Alias whose repo name is not a 4-part product string (sentinel None) is skipped from rr.

name: duplicate_product_names
description: Two patterns sharing a product name (SP4 + SP5) keep the duplicate in the product-remove argv.

name: no_matching_repos_only_pd
description: Patterns match a product but no repos: skip rr, only product-remove.

name: transactional_verify_fails
description: Transactional host, product still present after reboot: rr, transactional product remove, reboot; verify fails.

name: transactional_verify_passes
description: Transactional host, product gone after reboot: same sequence, verify passes.

name: dry_transactional
description: Dry transactional: rr, transactional product remove, then reboot (because !no_reboot).
